name: @xnetjs/dictation
description: Provider-agnostic, on-device speech-to-text. A DictationEngine port, a hold-to-talk state machine, transcript-history/retention helpers, and zero-native engines (fake + bring-your-own OpenAI-compatible HTTP). Platform engines (whisper.cpp, NVIDIA Parakeet, Apple Speech) implement the same port. Zero runtime dependencies. See docs/explorations/0192.
